title: abies alba var. compacta
intro: Abies alba var. compacta, also known as compact fir or dwarf silver fir, is a compact, slow-growing, evergreen shrub or small tree that belongs to the fir family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its fragrant, blue-green foliage and pyramidal shape. The medicinal properties of Abies alba var. compacta include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which are used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which have been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and promoting relaxation.
